data.title: Boeing Shares Are Trading Lower Wednesday: What's Going On?
data.description: Boeing Inc (NYSE: BA) shares are trading lower Wednesday following a disappointing third-quarter earnings report. Union members are expected to vote on a new proposed contract. Here's what you need to know.

data.title: Lido Staked Ether Decreases More Than 5% Within 24 hours
data.description: Lido Staked Ether's (CRYPTO: STETH) price has decreased 5.08% over the past 24 hours to $2,486.35, continuing its downward trend over the past week of -6.0%, moving from $2,622.75 to its current price.
